My cab driver: “What conference is it?”
Me: “It’s a tech conference called KubeCon.”

Him: [bursts out laughing]
Me: 😅
Him: 🤣🤣🤣
Me: 🫠

Hello KubeCon! I’m speaking today on building extensible platforms and I can’t wait. And for those of you building platform shaped projects… I have a challenge for you, if you’re feeling ambitious 👀

As always, please feel free to say hi if you see me!
Found @strongjz.bsky.social looking at ingress-nginx. #KubeCon

Hello #KubeCon day three! (Or two? Or four? Five?? Counting is hard)

The famous Kubernetes dress returns, too. Catch me floating around if you can!

Very impressed with the ventilation in the #kubecon public areas; the CO2 is usually in the 450-500 range; 435 in the press room with 10 people in here, which is about the same as being outside. Hope the session and lunch rooms and especially the parties are like that

So Kubecon EU is fucking ENORMOUS. I will report on numbers later but first impressions are just that it's simply very big. The @cncf.io is evidently still a critical foundation (pun intended) for modern software workloads.

🚨 ingress-nginx is now retired 🚨 

Stop by the SIG Security booth P-4B at #kubecon #cloudnativecon for a commemorative sticker!

We will be there this afternoon and Thursday afternoon. Hope to see you there!
Just landed at SLC for Kubecon. Where’s everybody at?

I’m sad to be missing #KubeCon this week. It looks like it is going well and I wish I was there!

I am, however, heading up to Vancouver on Thursday for #AtmosphereConf. Looking forward to learning a ton and meeting new people. If you see me please say hi!

yeah this one's not great, tbh. litellm is pretty core infrastructure.

I wouldn't call the actual payload here overly clever, it's a vacuum (though the kubernetes replication bit is cute), but a lot of the people maintaining this infra at companies do not necessarily know what time it is
She go to KubeCon day two. No more talks from me, but that just means I have all day to wander around and say hi to everyone!
He just dropped me off and said, “enjoy kubecon” and drove away laughing. ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

The #PlatformEngineeringDay greatness at the #KubeCon #CloudNativeCon doesn't stop: now we got @hazelweakly.me talking about building extensible platforms!

Things usually go this way: Strong components → system → complexity → components → ... Is the cycle unavoidable?

I wish there were more "outsider guides" to technologies, that explained what it is for people who hear about it or are adjacent to it but don't need to use it. Like what is Kubernetes? What problems does it solve? What makes it a hard problem to solve? What are the legendary warts?

We're at KubeCon Amsterdam. 

If you want to find out how to prevent misconfigurations ending up in production, come by (Hall 5, 1163).

Or join us for a chat about configuration, preventable outages, schemas, or our configuration control plane.

- Protocol declaration to skip protocol detection altogether

15 minutes until my first ever #KubeCon talk! 😱 

I'm really excited about this one. It's a fun talk that I'm giving with my good friend @sagikazarmark.com.

We're going to keep it lighthearted and upbeat.

Hall 7 // Room A

See y'all there! 💙

Today at #KubeCon we announced agentevals, so you can ship agents that actually work!

It's fully open-source, vendor-agnostic, and requires zero-code changes so you don't even need to adopt yet another SDK.

Check it out here: github.com/agentevals-d...

recent_posts.text:
Want to see how we prevent misconfiguration ending up in production? We're still here at KubeCon Amsterdam.

Come by for a chat at our booth in Hall 5, 1163 (below the Daily Market).

3rd part of this "Automating a greener future" at #KubeCon #CloudNative closing keynote was Michael Reichenbach on how Heartbeat AI (1komma5.com/en/press/pre...) run, secure and observe 12M "tiny power plants": the home of people able to store/product energy

Overall: Falco, OpenTelemetry, Fluentd

Hello #KubeCon day three! (Or two? Or four? Five?? Counting is hard)

The famous Kubernetes dress returns, too. Catch me floating around if you can!

Day 2 of KubeCon! Come say hello to the Pomerium crew in hall 1, booth #986.

Come for some socks, stay for the ingress! #KubeCon

Lunch in 1 hour! Plan to grab your lunch and head to the Kubernetes Meet + Greet in Europe Foyer! From 12:00-15:00 CET, drop in and chat with reps from Kubernetes Special Interest Groups and WorkingGroups to learn how you can get involved with the teams that power the project!
Headlamp Contribfest about to start at KubeCon EU 2026

Our team is here to walk through demos, answer architectural questions, or just chat about making Kubernetes operations a bit more predictable, so be sure to stop by.

See you there.
